theme_notes: Today's touchstones: the 2026 World Cup Round of 16 (Spain's stoppage-time winner over Portugal at AT&T Stadium, USA vs. Belgium in Seattle, Mexico losing 3-2 at Azteca), Trump enforcing 5% GDP defense pledges at the NATO summit in Ankara. Also riffing on Khamenei killed in an airstrike, Ukrainian drones knocking out a third of Russia's refining capacity, and AI independently executing a ransomware attack on real infrastructure.
settled: Spain hit the 90+1' winner. Your balance hit zero. Different scores, same relief.
NATO is in Ankara haggling over pledges. You two already settled yours. Rare.
Tesla's robotaxi runs without a driver. Your balance runs without drama. Let it ride.
youOwe: Less than a beer at AT&T Stadium. More embarrassing than a first-round exit.
AI ran a full ransomware attack with more follow-through than your Venmo history.
Trump's billing NATO for 5% GDP. You're being billed for 5% of a pad thai.
Spain waited 90 minutes for that goal. She's been waiting longer for this.
Ukraine's drones took out a third of Russia's oil. What exactly have you taken out?
Trump flew to Ankara to collect on promises. She texts from the couch. Different scale.
Enough for a nosebleed seat in Seattle for USA-Belgium. Not enough self-awareness.
Tesla's robotaxi has no driver and more accountability than you right now.
Air taxis are routing themselves to JFK now. Your payment is routing itself to never.
Mexico came back twice at Azteca and still lost. You borrowed this and still forgot.
That's 0.00001% of NATO's defense budget. It's 100% of this friendship's patience.
Ukraine bought surveillance drones for less. They found their targets. Immediately.
AI independently planned and executed a ransomware campaign. You independently forgot to Venmo.
Russia lost a third of its refining capacity to drones. You're losing a friendship to receipts.
The Ankara summit is about holding allies to promises. So is this push notification.
Khamenei ruled Iran for 35 years. You've held this debt nearly as long. Both are regimes.
Super Typhoon Bavi brought category-5 winds to the Pacific. This brought category-5 audacity.
Every NATO ally is being asked to show their financial commitment. This is yours.
theyOwe: Less than a World Cup program. You're tracking it anyway. Good instincts.
Tesla's robotaxi covers more distance per hour than their repayment pace.
Smaller than any NATO invoice. You're still owed. Don't let it go.
Spain held the lead 89 minutes. Hold yours.
AI followed through on a full cyberattack. They can't follow through on $80.
Ukraine's drones find their targets reliably. This Venmo request keeps missing.
USA vs. Belgium tonight. High stakes, no guarantees anyone gets paid.
Tesla navigates itself without human input. They require three reminders to open an app.
NATO allies pledge and underdeliver on spending. Must be catching.
Trump flew to Ankara to collect on defense pledges. You texted. Less mileage, same energy.
Mexico came back twice at Azteca and still lost 3-2. You know that feeling.
Ukraine knocked out Russian oil capacity. You're quietly knocking out your goodwill reserves.
AI executed a ransomware attack with more precision than they execute a bank transfer.
Russia's still losing refineries to drones and hasn't reconciled anything. Sound familiar.
The NATO patience summit is wrapping up in Ankara. So is yours.
Khamenei's gone. Some things finally end. This balance is still open in Splitwise.
NATO's combined defense budget won't cover what you're owed in emotional damages.
Spain scored in stoppage time. They've been scoring against you since day one.
